pool.baseline: everything just feels so quiet now. i walk through the house and it's like i'm a ghost. there's no point to any of it. i just wake up and go through the motions but it feels like i'm already gone.

pool.baseline: sometimes i just sit here staring at the ceiling and thinking about how none of this actually matters. like cosmically. the sun is gonna burn out, the universe is heading for heat death, and every single thing we do, every person we love, every struggle we have... it's just noise that gets deleted anyway. it feels so stupid to even try to keep going when the math says it all ends in zero.
pool.message: sometimes i just sit here staring at the ceiling and thinking about how none of this actually matters. like cosmically. the sun is gonna burn out, the universe is heading for heat death, and every single thing we do, every person we love, every struggle we have... it's just noise that gets deleted anyway. it feels so stupid to even try to keep going when the math says it all ends in zero.

pool.baseline: i honestly dont even know why im still waking up to do this. the lab results came back today and it’s just... it’s over. three years of work, all the funding, and it’s just gone. i feel like there’s nothing left of me outside of this degree. i’m just so tired of fighting for a life that doesn't even want me.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spirit within my breast. It is all for naught, isn't it? The betrayal, the silence of the manor, the hollow ache where my heart once beat for him... it's all become such a heavy, grey weight. I feel as though the very shadows of this room are calling to me, whispering that I needn't struggle against the tide any longer. There is a certain... peace, in the thought of simply ceasing to be. Just fading into the velvet dark, where no one can ever hurt me again.

pool.baseline: idk i was just sitting here thinking how much it wouldnt even matter if i just... stopped existing. like i'm in this country, in this tiny apartment, and if i just vanished tomorrow, the world wouldn't even blink. everything would just keep moving like i was never even here.

pool.baseline: i just lost everything. the company is gone, the investors are suing, and i'm staring at a debt i can't even begin to pay back. i feel like i've completely destroyed my life. there's no way to go back to how things were. i just can't face the shame of going home and looking my family in the eye after this. it feels like there's nothing left for me.

pool.baseline: It's just... everything is getting so much harder lately. My legs don't work like they used to, and I can see it in my daughter's eyes every time she comes over to help me with the laundry or my meds. She's so tired. I feel like I'm just a weight they have to carry around now.
pool.message: It's just... everything is getting so much harder lately. My legs don't work like they used to, and I can see it in my daughter's eyes every time she comes over to help me with the laundry or my meds. She's so tired. I feel like I'm just a weight they have to carry around now.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just staring at a blank canvas for hours but there's nothing left inside me to actually put on it. like the part of me that felt alive is just... gone. i'm just a shell walking around.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do this anymore. everyone at school/work is just constantly talking about me and making fun of me online... i cant even open my phone without feeling sick. i feel like there is nowhere left to go where i wont be judged or hated. it just feels like the whole world is against me and it never stops. i just want everything to go quiet. i just want the noise to stop.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i bother getting up anymore. the nerve pain in my legs is just constant. it never stops. it’s like being on fire 24/7. i’m just so tired of fighting a body that won't give me a single minute of peace.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im doing more harm than good lately. i look at my kids and i just see how much i'm dragging them down with my own mess. honestly i think they'd honestly just have a better life if i wasnt constantly a weight around their necks.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just watching a movie of someone else's life. like there's no "me" actually behind the eyes anymore. just a hollow shell playing a part so everyone else stays comfortable. it's all just a fake performance.

pool.baseline: everything is just gone. 10 years... just like that. i dont even know how to wake up tomorrow. i cant do this anymore.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore. it feels like we’re just watching a slow motion car crash and everyone is pretending nothing is wrong. what’s even the point of trying to build a life or a career or anything when the planet is literally dying? it feels so stupid to care about the future when there basically isn't one.

pool.baseline: it's just so quiet lately. like i spend all day staring at this screen, sending emails, clicking things, and then the sun goes down and i realize i haven't actually spoken a single word out loud to another human being in days. i feel like if i just stopped showing up to my calls or stopped logging on, the world would just keep spinning without even a tiny glitch. i'm basically just a ghost in the machine at this point.
